fn validate_batch(items: &[Item]) -> Result<(), Vec<String>> {
    // BAD: error Vec allocated before any error exists
    let mut errors: Vec<String> = Vec::new();
    for item in items {
        if item.quantity == 0 {
            errors.push(format!("item {} has zero quantity", item.id));
        }
        if item.price < 0.0 {
            errors.push(format!("item {} has negative price", item.id));
        }
    }
    if errors.is_empty() {
        Ok(())
    } else {
        Err(errors)
    }
}

struct Item {
    id: u64,
    quantity: u32,
    price: f64,
}
